title: Farm a'Head
description: This Mod adds new Food to The Game
body:
This Mod adds new Rescources to The Game, wich can be procesed into new Food items. This could give The player an overview of how to process food and how its produced. Furthermore is this mod used to give more content to the player wich he can explore.



The mod offeres new items in form of Food wich can be consumed by the player and sometimes giving him new effects to play arround. You can also Process food so you have more nutrition from these Items and also get better effects out of them Wich will result in a More fun expiriance in the Game especially if you enjoy the Mod with some of your Friends.
